query:
-- Users with actual puzzle attempts
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, COUNT(pa.id) AS attempts, SUM(pa.isCorrect) AS correct
FROM users u
JOIN puzzle_attempts pa ON u.id = pa.userId
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email
ORDER BY attempts DESC;
command:
